metadata.description: Claude Code skills and plugins for LPs and VCs — portfolio monitoring, diligence, and workflow automation.

plugins.name: portfolio-news-monitor-starter
plugins.description: Scaffolds a daily portfolio-news intelligence dashboard. Ask for one domain per line, auto-enriches each company, runs the first refresh, and creates daily + weekly scheduled tasks. Dashboard is a constant HTML template; each refresh writes a data file the page loads on open. Customize afterward by chatting to Claude.

plugins.name: fund-rollup-starter
plugins.description: One-time guided setup that turns an LP's or family office's folder of fund statements (PDF or Excel, any administrator) into a portfolio roll-up workbook AND a bespoke, reusable roll-up skill named for them.
